title: TeraWulf Rallies After Acquiring 1 GW 'Muskie' AI Data Campus In Kentucky — Its Second In The State
description: TeraWulf has expanded its AI footprint in Kentucky, now operating two data center campuses, in addition to its 480 MW Justified Data Campus.

title: TeraWulf jumps 11% as data center firm announces 1 GW Kentucky campus
description: The bitcoin miner and data center operator adds a second major Kentucky site, with 500 MW expected to ramp in the second half of 2028 and utility-scale transmission agreements already…

title: TeraWulf shares rise after securing 1GW-plus Kentucky data campus project (WULF)
description: Shares of TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) gained 4. 7% in premarket trading on Tuesday after the company announced the acquisition of a hyperscale high-performance computing development site in eastern Kentucky.

title: TeraWulf Expands Infrastructure Platform with Acquisition of 1+ GW Eastern Kentucky HPC Campus
description: New “Muskie Data Campus” establishes one of the largest scalable AI and HPC development sites in Kentucky...

title: Top Growth Companies With Strong Insider Stakes May 2026
description: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has risen by 1.1%, contributing to a notable 29% increase over the past year, with earnings anticipated to grow by 17% annually. In this thriving environment, growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often indicate strong confidence from those closest to the business.

title: Kentucky Campus Deal and HPC Leases Might Change The Case For Investing In TeraWulf (WULF)
description:
TeraWulf recently reported its Q1 2026 results, highlighting revenue heavily supported by high-performance computing lease income, a liquidity position of about US$3.10 billion in cash and restricted cash, and the acquisition of a Kentucky campus with access to 480 MW of grid-connected power.
Alongside this expansion, the company is advancing construction at Lake Mariner and through its Abernathy joint venture, while senior executives saw large blocks of performance-based stock units vest,...
